decision_summary: Approve TASK-080 Archmap provider baseline update to Archmap v0.1.1.
rationale: The update changes external provider references and AI-facing authoring guidance while preserving the boundary that Archmap source and AOF artifacts remain source of truth; it does not claim full renderer integration or diagram quality proof.
recommendation: Close TASK-080 after Archmap impact, review provenance, evidence independence, and release-state audits pass.
target_audience: AOF operator maintaining external architecture-map provider compatibility.
expected_user_reaction: The operator should see that AOF now points to Archmap v0.1.1 and optional archmap-icons v0.1.2 without overclaiming product integration.
artifact_change_recommendations: Keep future ScreenFlow or Prototype adoption behind a governed work item instead of silently treating Archmap v0.1.1 features as implemented AOF capability.
organization_change_recommendations: Treat external provider baseline changes as Archmap-impacting work items when they affect AI authoring, Mission Control, or architecture-map semantics.
